headline: 7 contracts catalogued across Tron, Ethereum, and BNB Chain; primary USDD token and 6 core protocol contracts identified

findings.text: USDD token contract on Tron (TPYmHEhy5n8TCEfYGqW2rPxsghSfzghPDn) located via official Business Wire press release and USDD documentation
USDD token contract on Ethereum (0x0C10bF8FcB7Bf5412187A595ab97a3609160b5c6) located via official press release and marketplace references
USDD token contract on BNB Chain (0xd17479997f34dd9156deef8f95a52d81d265be9c) located via official press release
Official USDD documentation site (docs.usdd.io) lists Deployment Addresses page with core protocol contracts
No audit links recorded in the per-protocol context; no audit PDFs retrieved
No GitHub repository recorded in the per-protocol context; unable to verify deployment artifacts
Multi-chain coverage: USDD deployed across Tron, Ethereum, and BNB Chain as specified in protocol.chains
No factory contracts identified; USDD is a single stablecoin token with associated protocol contracts
Role taxonomy applied: USDD identified as 'token' role; core protocol contracts identified with roles like Vat (vault), Jug (stability fee module), Dog (liquidation engine), Spot (oracle feed), etc.
All discovered addresses trace to fetched URLs in evidence[]

rationale.verdict: Discovered three USDD token contracts (TRON, Ethereum, BNB Chain) plus six additional core protocol contracts on TRON from official documentation and press releases. Block explorer fetches were blocked; further address enumeration and on-chain state reading will require alternative methods in next run.

evidence.shows: Official launch announcement by TRON DAO Reserve (May 5, 2022) listing USDD token contract addresses on TRON (TPYmHEhy5n8TCEfYGqW2rPxsghSfzghPDn), Ethereum (0x0C10bF8FcB7Bf5412187A595ab97a3609160b5c6), and BNB Chain (0xd17479997f34dd9156deef8f95a52d81d265be9c)

USDD documentation listing core protocol contracts on TRON Mainnet: USDD (TCrEVahRbhDFB6uRXEWUg7wkptXvg47GKs), USDD Join, Vat, Jug, Dog, Vow, Flap, Flop, Spot, End, ESM, Pause with their corresponding contract addresses

Confirmation that USDD operates on TRON, Ethereum, and BNB Chain with bridged deployments on non-native chains via Reserve-operated bridges; cross-chain deployments operate as bridged assets rather than native issuance

USDD 2.0 announcement (October 2025) confirming native expansion to Ethereum (September 8, 2025) and BNB Chain; details collateral smart contracts on TRON and Ethereum with publicly verifiable addresses; confirms TRON DAO Reserve custody and management

unknowns: D2: Canonical deployed_contracts_doc page not fetched due to access restrictions on docs.usdd.io domain
D3: No audit links recorded in per-protocol context; audit PDFs not available for scope extraction
D4: No GitHub repository recorded in per-protocol context; deployment artifact files not accessible
D1-offchain: Block explorer URLs (etherscan.io, bscscan.com, tronscan.org) returned access-denied errors; on-chain verification of contract state deferred to next run
D6: Full enumeration of reserve collateral wallet addresses deferred; Medium article references addresses but site-specific fetch required

protocol_metadata.about: USDD (Decentralized USD) is an over-collateralized algorithmic stablecoin issued by the TRON DAO Reserve, pegged 1:1 to the US dollar through a basket of crypto collateral (TRX, BTC, USDT, USDC). Launched May 5, 2022 on TRON, it later expanded to Ethereum and BNB Chain via bridged deployments and native issuance. The protocol uses a hybrid stability mechanism combining reserve over-collateralization, TRX burn-and-mint arbitrage, and a Peg Stability Module (PSM) allowing 1:1 swaps with USDC/USDT.
